nodes.label: Bluetooth Indoor Localization with Multiple Neural Networks (Altini et al., ISWPC 2010)
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Bluetooth indoor localization with multiple neural networks : IEEE 5th International Sympos.pdf
nodes.source_location: IEEE 5th International Symposium on Wireless Pervasive Computing 2010
nodes.author: Marco Altini, Davide Brunelli, Elisabetta Farella, Luca Benini

nodes.label: Multiple Neural Networks Architecture for Bluetooth Localization
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Bluetooth indoor localization with multiple neural networks : IEEE 5th International Sympos.pdf
nodes.rationale: Multiple neural networks tailored per user orientation handle RSSI variability caused by the user's body absorbing RF signals; separate NNs handle node failures, improving resilience.

nodes.label: User Orientation Effect on RSSI for Bluetooth Localization
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Bluetooth indoor localization with multiple neural networks : IEEE 5th International Sympos.pdf
nodes.rationale: Body absorption of RF signal differs with user orientation, causing systematic RSSI shifts that degrade single-model localization; orientation-specific NNs mitigate this.
